description: As a charge nurse, document a patient fall incident in HospitalRun for patient Maria Santos. File a report with the following details: Department: Hospital; Date of Incident: 01/15/2025; Reported To: Dr. James Chen; Category: Patient Fall; Harm/Sentinel Event: No. Description: 'Patient found on floor beside bed at 0230 after attempting to reach bathroom unassisted. No visible injuries noted on assessment. Patient alert and oriented x4. Vital signs stable - BP 128/78, HR 82, RR 16, SpO2 97% on room air. Bed alarm was activated but patient had removed wrist band prior to ambulation attempt. Attending physician Dr. Chen notified at 0245 and came to assess. Fall risk reassessment completed - upgraded to high fall risk. One-to-one sitter ordered for remainder of admission. Incident occurred in room 412B.' Save the completed incident report.
